objective: Measure selected natural ChildLens distributions and test one frozen transcription-free participant-cross-validated alignment-versus-lag estimand, as a prerequisite to any later separately authorized apples-to-apples simulation study of synchronized training-only physical side cues.
claim_boundary: A development pass could recommend separately authorized locked confirmation and, only after that confirmation and separate authorization, permit simulation calibrated to measured ChildLens ages-3-to-5 distributions with identical instruments and learning architecture. It would not establish infant calibration, German lexical grounding, natural-world causal grounding, or side-cue lift.

stage0.allowed_inputs: released metadata, released timed annotations, and manifests proven by an outer scope receipt to contain exactly the 18 development participants

uniform_duration.selection_rule: min(preferred, common development-only released availability), floored to the minute; stop if below minimum or total-hour gate

representative.rule: deterministic hash sample from released speech-like timing across quantiles of each participant's available recording time

grounding_enriched.timed_rule: use only uniformly bound released timed subevents
grounding_enriched.metadata_only_fallback: because prior outcome-blind v4 availability established that timed subevents are not uniformly bound, do not oversample within recordings; conditionally summarize recording-level coarse-activity matches and suppress unsupported cells
grounding_enriched.natural_mixture_weights: estimate participant-clustered shares from all selected representative observation time; never substitute enriched sampling shares

instruments.upstream_hash_semantics: Git-LFS OID is SHA256 of downloaded weight bytes; small-file SHA256 is over resolved bytes at the pinned revision

learner.temporal_pooling: masked per-channel mean and standard deviation concatenation
learner.audio_projector: LayerNorm(2048), Linear(2048,256), GELU, Dropout(0.10), Linear(256,128), L2 normalize
learner.vision_projector: LayerNorm(768), Linear(768,256), GELU, Dropout(0.10), Linear(256,128), L2 normalize
learner.loss: symmetric in-batch audio-to-vision and vision-to-audio InfoNCE
learner.batch_rule: one deterministic scale-balanced real window per training participant per step
learner.compute_budget: 3 folds x 3 seeds x 80 epochs x 12 participant-balanced steps; frozen frontend embedding once per unique window/control

cross_validation.assignment: deterministic capacity-constrained greedy minimization frozen in preflight.py

windows_and_lags.sampling: deterministic, nonoverlapping within duration and spread across recording-time quantiles

matching.deterministic_tie_break: SHA256 of frozen seed and private row bindings
matching.unmatched_rows: retain in support accounting but exclude from that lag contrast; no substitution after outcomes

windows_and_lags.persistent_scene_audit: report adjacent-frame and each-lag visual cosine/persistence; a near-tie at a short lag is interpreted jointly with the full curve, never alone

inference.primary_contrast: zero lag minus mean of signed 2x and 4x duration lags, averaged within participant then across participants
inference.cross_fold_heterogeneity: inverse-variance I2 plus max-minus-min fold primary contrast

shared.governance: all bindings pass, v1-v4 immutable, exactly 18 development and zero locked rows loaded, no excluded source or method
shared.support: uniform duration at least 600 seconds each, at least 3 total hours, all 18 evaluated once, and at least 40 nuisance-matched rows per participant-duration
shared.positive_control: frozen positive-control mean >=0.10 and participant-cluster 90% lower >=0.05
shared.preprocessing: at least 98% frozen windows embed without substitution; each fold/scale at least five evaluable participants
shared.shortcut_interpretable: within-recording curve available at every scale, persistence audit available, and shuffle not used as standalone evidence
shared.heterogeneity: primary fold I2 <=50% and fold max-minus-min <=0.03

PASS_PRECISE_WEAK_OR_FLAT.interpretation: distributional calibration to reproducibly weak or undetectable alignment, not proof of no true grounding

model_independent_calibration: speech-bout duration, density, gaps, and speech seconds per observation minute
activity duration/recurrence, coarse activity/location shares, and natural mixture weights
motion, adjacent-frame persistence, and scene-change rate
audio RMS/log energy, non-silent fraction, clipping/quality, and retained-window distributions
alignment-versus-signed-lag response and cross-participant control envelope

public_forbidden: participant, item, media, session, or object identifiers

stop_rule: This is the sole v5 route. Any governance, support, sensitivity, precision, heterogeneity, preprocessing, or shortcut failure terminates v5 as NO_GO_UNINFORMATIVE. Do not start v6 or another model.
